column1: # calibration-queries.tsv — executable source for the #468 APIRouteHighErrorRate calibration.
# Format: <label><TAB><PromQL>  (one query per line; lines starting with # are ignored).
# Read by BOTH run-calibration-queries.sh and run-calibration-queries.ps1 — this is the
# single executable copy. The annotated human reference (with PASS/FAIL guidance) lives in
# docs/operations/slo.md -> "Calibrating APIRouteHighErrorRate"; keep the two in sync when
# the rule's metric/label names or thresholds change.
# Step 1 — confirm http_route is the route template (low cardinality)
1a — distinct route labels (expect templated paths, not raw IDs)
1c — empty/missing-route series (small fixed set is fine)
# Step 2 — characterize traffic to choose a volume floor vs. a longer for:
2a — per-route avg request rate, req/s over 14d
2e — false-positive windows under the CURRENT rule (ratio > 5%), 14d
2f — false-positive windows WITH a 5 req/5m floor (compare vs 2e), 14d
column2: count_over_time(((sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{http_response_status_code=~"5.."}[5m])) / sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count[5m])) > 0.05) and (sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count[5m])) > 0.0167))[14d:5m])
